feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Using base, interface and consumption view for a entity
entry.content:
Dear community,

I was wondering about the sense of base views in an RAP context: Most of the documentation and tutorials I read claim that in RAP a single entity should be composed out of three CDS view layers: (1) base view, (2) interface view and (3) consumption view. This is also reflected in the showcase app.

However, from my experiences so far with RAP I find all three layers rather cumbersome. If one layer is skipped I think the base layer is the obvious choice. Entities consisting out of interface view and consumption view only can be seen for example in the DMO flight scenario.

I was wondering what are the experiences of others. Do you use all three layers or only two? What are your experiences there?

Kind regards

entry.title: SAP RAP Fiori Elements Object Page Multi-Input Dropdown
entry.content:
Hi,

I am looking for help to create a multi-input combo box on a Fiori elements Object page created using RESTFul ABAP.

I'm following the instructions provided in the below link:

Using the Multi-Input Field on the Object Page - Documentation - Demo Kit - SAPUI5 SDK

I understand that I need to define a composition to the entity which is required to be displayed in the multi-input control. However, if I define the composition, I also have to define a to-parent relationship in the child entity which can be done only on the key of the parent. In my case the parent's key field is a GUID value which cannot be specified in the entity for multi-input control. 

More details of my example:

1. The multi-input field is required for an entity with possible Values. I have defined as below:

define view entity Z_I_NameValues
as select from ...
composition [1..*] of Z_I_Value as _Values2.

2. The parent entity's key field is GUID, but there are other fields such as Name and Value. Multi-Input dropdown is needed on the field Value.

3. Definition of value help child entity Z_I_Value:
define view entity Z_I_Value
as select from ...
{ key Name, key Value} 

How do I define the parent-child entity relationship to display the Value field as multi-input value?

Thanks,

Abhishek

entry.title: Software Component (Partner Demo Development Tenant) Multitenancy SaaS Application
entry.content:
Hello Dear Experts,

I am trying to create a software component to develop multitenant SaaS products in the partner demo development system. However, I get an error like the one below.

SCLM(Software Component Lifecycle Management) application is not configured in the current business tenant

 

 https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3530333

Resolution
TDD system (Partner Demo Development Tenant) is being used and in this tenant only predefined Software Components exist and other software components cannot be created:
 
  • Software Component ZPARTNER => Multi-Off Development
  • Software Component ZLOCAL => System Local Development which can not be transported or deployed


This is what SAP said about the error. In this case, we seem to be unable to create a software component, but is there a different way we can proceed? I wanted to ask you about something that can be done to create a software component.

Or do we need a different partner system so that we can create software components for our developments?

If we create a development package with the namespace we have previously registered in our partner development system and develop it with the ZPARTNER software component, will we have problems in the future when offering this product as a multitenant SaaS application? How should we proceed?

Reasons for Necessity:

Dear @FrankJentsch, your valuable comments and suggestions will make a great contribution. Thank you very much for your support.

entry.title: Updating Short text of Inspection Lot using BO Interface - I_INSPECTIONLOTTP_2 (EML/RAP)
entry.content:
Hallo,

Link to details of Business Object Interface I_INSPECTIONLOTTP_2 - https://api.sap.com/bointerface/PCE_I_INSPECTIONLOTTP_2 

I am trying to use this BO interface to update the short text of Inspection Lot

 

DATA: ls_update_mapped TYPE RESPONSE FOR MAPPED I_InspectionLotTP_2,
      ls_update_failed TYPE RESPONSE FOR FAILED I_InspectionLotTP_2,
      ls_update_reported TYPE RESPONSE FOR REPORTED I_InspectionLotTP_2.

      MODIFY ENTITIES OF I_InspectionLotTP_2
  ENTITY InspectionLot
    UPDATE FIELDS ( InspectionLotText )
    WITH VALUE #( (
    %key-inspectionlot = <fs_insplot>-prueflos
                    %data-InspectionLotText = lv_shorttext
                    %control-InspectionLotText = if_abap_behv=>mk-on ) )
    MAPPED ls_update_mapped
  FAILED ls_update_failed
  REPORTED ls_update_reported.

 

 

<fs_insplot>-prueflos has the inspection lot number and lv_shorttext has the new short text.

Problem faced is - ls_update_failed is always filled with error

CAUSE - UNSPECIFIC

Thanks.

entry.title: What to consider when selling self-developed Fiori applications?
entry.content:
I am an experienced full stack developer working as an employee with large S/4HANA systems. I developed an fiori app (including a RAP backend) that i want to sell to different companies. It will run on S/4HANA On-Premise and Private Cloud. I don´t want to use the SAP Store but instead promote it via my network and sell it directly.

What do i need to consider when doing so?

As far as I understand it, selling a self-built Fiori app is not really different from selling development services. In both cases, SAP technologies (SAPUI5, RAP, ABAP, ...) are being used and the application always runs on customer systems which are licensed SAP systems.

I already got in contact with the SAP Partner Support, but they weren´t able to give me a clear answer. They only gave information regarding the partner program, but not if it is actually necessary in my case or what options i have as a one-person company.

entry.title: Issue in processing multiple PO in behavior class using MODIFY EML statement
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a requirement to create new entries in existing PO Item-> Pricing Element where the values are passed from a behavior implementation class of a custom table in a loop.

MODIFY EML update statement (to create NEW entries inside a particular po item) works only for last PO in the loop, but not the earlier PO's passed from the loop. Note: COMMIT statement not allowed in a behavior class. I too tried with just hardcoded values outside any loop, by executing MODIFY EML statement twice for different POs one by one. Here too, only the last hardcoded unique PO->PO item-> pricing elements were created in the system.

How to make all POs inserted with new pricing elements when different POs are passed dynamically?

MODIFY EML statement:

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_purchaseordertp_2 PRIVILEGED

ENTITY purchaseorderitem

CREATE BY \_purordpricingelement SET FIELDS WITH VALUE #(

( %key-purchaseorder = 'PO1'

%key-purchaseorderitem = '0010'

%target = VALUE #( (

%cid = |CID{ sy-tabix }|

conditiontype = 'FVA1'

conditionrateamount = '1'

conditioncurrency = 'USD' ) ) ) )

MAPPED DATA(mapped_pe1)

FAILED DATA(failed_pe1)

REPORTED DATA(reported_pe1).

 

MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_purchaseordertp_2 PRIVILEGED

ENTITY purchaseorderitem

CREATE BY \_purordpricingelement SET FIELDS WITH VALUE #(

( %key-purchaseorder = 'PO2'

%key-purchaseorderitem = '0010'

%target = VALUE #( (

%cid = |CID{ sy-tabix }|

conditiontype = 'FVA1'

conditionrateamount = '2'

conditioncurrency = 'USD' ) ) ) )

MAPPED DATA(mapped_pe2)

FAILED DATA(failed_pe2)

REPORTED DATA(reported_pe2).

 

In the above code, only the last PO - 'PO2' is getting executed by creating new entries of pricing element in the 'PO2', Line item '0010'.

entry.title: RAP validation works in Preview but not in Fiori Elements List Report
entry.content:
Hello,

Newbie in RAP. I have created a demo app in a sandbox environment.

There is a very basic validation implemented where a field (Office Space) must start with "FL". This works perfectly well when using the "Preview" functionality from Eclipse. The error message appears and the field is highlighted.

However, after creating a List Report with the standard template from Visual Studio Code, only the generic error appears, not the one related to the field.

Below you can find the definition and implementation:

To be noted that if I remove the %state_area value, the error appears in a popup but the field is still not highlighted.

Without %state_area:

So maybe I misuse the %state_area? I have just used a dummy text "OFFICE_SPACE". Should the values for this field be predefined somewhere?

entry.title: SAP XI/PI excel to custom RFC
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

in my old custom RFC there are 3 import parameters ( IV_NAME, IV_AGE, IV_ADDRESS )

Existing

FieldIV_NAMEIV_AgeIV_Address
ValueNAME118Canada

need to add

FieldIV_CITY
ValueCITY1

in the XI/PO mapping the parameter is ( IV_NAME, IV_AGE, IV_ADDRESS )

In the new requirement we need to add and get the City from file created from XI/PO, I already adjusted the custom RFC and added the IV_CITY and the XI/PO team also added the new parameter IV_CITY to the mapping. while doing debugging, I checked the import parameter in the RFC and saw that the RFC did not receive the City value, what could be the cause of the issue?

entry.title: How to set default values in Input elements on the Create Object Page in Fiori UI5
entry.content:
Hi Experts! I am a newbie to Fiori and ABAP RAP.
I want to set default values in some input elements on the Create Object Page in Fiori UI5. How can I do that?

Thank you

entry.title: How to bypass/skip messages from calling a released RAP BO
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a scenario where we are calling a released RAP BO from one of our custom action to create a material document. We are fine with the success messages getting displayed.

However, is there a way for us to bypass/hide the error messages or at least be able to rework the messages using the REPORTED data? I know that one workaround for this is to add an extra validation to handle the errors manually so that we won't get this error message unexpectedly but I am just wondering if there is a way to handle these?

entry.title: Unique Sales Orders from VBPA for a Customer in CDS
entry.content:
Hi,

How to optimally model CDS views to fetch unique Sales orders from VBPA table for a Customer / Partner whose Function can be Ship-to party or Sold-to party. If Partner is both Ship-to/Sold-to then only unique record is required. If Partner is Ship-to and some other partner is Sold-to, then both partner details are required to be extracted while having unique Sales Order record.

This can be achieved easily with traditional abap code. Interested to see if CDS can be modeled to achieve the same.

 

regards,

Dev

entry.title: Generate ABAP Repository objects not display after install
entry.content:
I installed the RAP Generator according to the GitHub guide:
https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-abap-rap?tab=readme-ov-file
I used ZABAPGIT_STANDALONE and a ZIP file for the installation.
The service binding ZDMO_UI_RAPG_PROJECT_O2 was not available, so I created it and published it:

When I right-click on the project or table, the option of "Generate ABAP Repository Objects does not appear":

However, it does appear for the project connected to ABAP ENV in BTP.
My system is S/4Hana 2021 on RISE, and these are the versions of Hana studio:

Any idea?


Thanks and Regards,

Danielle

entry.title: How to transfer selected items from List Page to popup Abstract Entity in RAP?
entry.content:
I have an application where, on the List Page, I select multiple records, and then click a button to process them. I need to choose the main item from the selected records, and for that, a popup created through Abstract Entity appears. In this popup, I need to pass the selected data from the List Page into a dropdown.

Example workflow

1. I select several record  

2. I click a button that opens the Abstract Entity dialog 

3. In this dialog, I need to choose from the previously selected items 

Here is your Abstract Entity code :

 

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Abstract Entity'
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true
define root abstract entity ZCPO_ProdOrder_ENTITY

{
  @EndUserText.label: 'Choice reference production order'
  key productionOrder : abap.char(12);
}

 

How can this functionality be implemented?

Thanks and Regards, 
Andrei

entry.title: SAP RAP/Fiori Elements Increase Visible Items on Object Page
entry.content:
Hi,

I've a managed RAP application with a child entity rendered as a table on the object page. By default the RAP framework displays only 5 items in the table. Is there a way I can have more items in one screen? I've tried enabling the full screen function through BAS during deployment and unfortunately only 5 items are displayed on the enlarged screen as well. I'm assuming this would be a common requirement and SAP would have given a way to deal with this. Suggestions please. We are on S/4HANA 2022.

Best Regard,

Saurabh

entry.title: RAP OData v4 Web-API metadata nullable action parameter (abstract entity)
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I already asked a general question about the nullable option here and found solutions for properties based on CDS entities and custom entities. Now I need a solution for the properties of action parameter structures defined as abstract entities. How can I make the nullable="false" disappear in this case?

 

We're on a S/4 HANA oP 2023 release.

entry.title: How to Add Check Box in RAP APPLICATION
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created an RAP-based application, now I want to know when I am going to click on the GO button and need the Check Box in the Status Column in the output List.

 

 

Regards

Ami

entry.title: SAP Fiori Elements/RAP Table Control on Object Page freezes randomly
entry.content:
Hi,

I've a RAP-based draft-enabled Fiori app with a table control rendered on the object page for the child entity. I'm facing a strange problem where the table control freezes randomly while scrolling or entering values in quick succession. There are no backend calls pending. So, its definitely the UI5 component. Everything works well again if I refresh the page. Interestingly, this happens in our QA system and not in Dev. The table control just goes into the loading state infinitely with the rest of the app being functional at the same time. I've no idea what's going on. No errors in the console or the network tab. Please suggest. We are on S/4HANA 2022

Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: In RAP, Issue with BAPI Warning Message Handling in Unmanaged Save
entry.content:
I am working on an application in RAP, where I am using a managed scenario with an unmanaged save. In the save_modified method, I am calling a BAPI. The issue I am encountering is that the BAPI returns a warning, along with success and other informational messages. However, when the pop-up appears, it only shows the warning message.

When I click "Create," the process runs again, and on the second attempt, it displays all the messages together. This behavior is frustrating because the VBELN (sales document number) is generated twice. I am unsure if this is a bug or if there is an issue with the code.

I have attached both screenshots for your reference. Any guidance or assistance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Can we use open source libraries with RAP or CAP ?
entry.content: I want to use an open source library such as moment.js in RAP application , Is it possible ?

entry.title: I am trying to create a virtual element for the CDS view and need to get the output as string or tex
entry.content: When i put the virtual element, it keeps erroring out and says keyword localized is expected
